spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the headline capability the spec promises: navigator.storage.estimate() returns identical quota in normal and incognito. Aligned with the chromestatus motivation.

interactive.rationale: Live interactive controls present and wired up — passes the no-static-card rule.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb on the feature index closely matches what the concept page delivers — title, lede, and interactive surface line up.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now has a Chrome <151 Incognito simulation mode that synthesizes the old RAM-derived quota, letting the detector visibly fire even on a fixed browser.

references.rationale: The concept page now embeds the canonical chromestatus.com/feature/5143175657291776 link in its see-also section.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex creeping in, button colours and contrast appear within AA.

summary: DevTools MCP verified /v151/incognitostaticstoragequota/detection-attack-lab/: live Run attack reported Indistinguishable, the Chrome <151 simulation produced 2 fired signals from the synthetic quota threshold and RAM-ratio checks, Reset returned the page to Awaiting probe, the ChromeStatus link was present, and the console had no errors.
